mapper.select:
SELECT EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME, NVL(SUM(RUN_TIME), 0) AS runTime, -- 运行总时长 NVL(SUM(WORK_TIME), 0) AS workTime, -- 工作总时长 NVL(SUM(FAULT_TIME), 0) AS faultTime, -- 故障总时长 NVL(SUM(RUN_MILEAGE),0) AS runMileage, -- 运行总里程 SUM(WORK_TON) AS workTon, -- 工作总吨数 SUM(WORK_BOX) AS workBox, -- 工作总箱数 -- 运行率（百分比）= 运行总时长/(故障+运行时长) * 100，保留2位小数（常规百分比格式） CASE WHEN (NVL(SUM(FAULT_TIME), 0) + NVL(SUM(RUN_TIME), 0)) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(SUM(RUN_TIME), 0) / (NVL(SUM(FAULT_TIME), 0) + NVL(SUM(RUN_TIME), 0)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS runRate, -- 运行率（%） -- 故障率（百分比）= 故障总时长/(故障+运行时长) * 100 CASE WHEN (NVL(SUM(FAULT_TIME), 0) + NVL(SUM(RUN_TIME), 0)) > 0 THEN ROUND(NVL(SUM(FAULT_TIME), 0) / (NVL(SUM(FAULT_TIME), 0) + NVL(SUM(RUN_TIME), 0)) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS faultRate, -- 故障率（%） -- 完好率（百分比）= (运行时长-故障时长)/运行时长 * 100 CASE WHEN NVL(SUM(RUN_TIME), 0) > 0 THEN ROUND((NVL(SUM(RUN_TIME), 0) - NVL(SUM(FAULT_TIME), 0)) / NVL(SUM(RUN_TIME), 0) * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS intactRate -- 完好率（%） FROM E_M_EQPT_OPERATION where 1=1
and EQUIP_NAME like #{equipNameLike}
and WORK_DATE >= to_date(#{startTime},'yyyy-MM-dd')
and WORK_DATE <= to_date(#{endTime},'yyyy-MM-dd')
GROUP BY EQUIP_ID, EQUIP_NAME
